mapper.select:
SELECT
b.attachment_idx as attachmentIdx, b.board_idx as boardIdx, b.board_article_idx as boardArticleIdx, b.server_file_name as serverFileName, b.attachment_name as attachmentName, b.attachment_ext as attachmentExt, b.attachment_order as attachmentOrder, DATE_FORMAT(b.date_created, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateCreated, b.user_id_created as userIdCreated, (select user_name_ko from user where user_id = b.user_id_created) as userNameCreated, DATE_FORMAT(b.date_modified, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateModified, b.user_id_modified as userIdModified, (select user_name_ko from user where user_id = b.user_id_modified) as userNameModified, b.flag_deleted as flagDeleted, b.file_exists as fileExists, b.attachment_size as attachmentSize
FROM attachment b, board_article c
WHERE
b.flag_deleted = '0'
AND b.board_idx = #{boardIdx}
AND b.board_article_idx = #{boardArticleIdx}
AND b.board_article_idx = c.board_article_idx
AND c.open_yn = 'y'
ORDER BY
b.attachment_order,
b.date_created desc
LIMIT #{listLimit} OFFSET #{listOffset}

SELECT
count(*)
FROM attachment
WHERE 1 = 1
AND board_idx = #{boardIdx}
AND board_article_idx = #{boardArticleIdx}
AND flag_deleted = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attachment ( board_idx, board_article_idx, server_file_name, attachment_name, attachment_ext, attachment_order, date_created, user_id_created, flag_deleted, file_exists, attachment_size ) VALUES ( #{boardIdx}, #{boardArticleIdx}, #{serverFileName}, #{attachmentName}, #{attachmentExt}, #{attachmentOrder}, now(), #{userIdCreated}, '0', '1', #{attachmentSize} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
attachment_idx as attachmentIdx, board_idx as boardIdx, board_article_idx as boardArticleIdx, server_file_name as serverFileName, attachment_name as attachmentName, attachment_ext as attachmentExt, attachment_order as attachmentOrder, DATE_FORMAT(date_created, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateCreated, user_id_created as userIdCreated, DATE_FORMAT(date_modified, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateModified, user_id_modified as userIdModified, flag_deleted as flagDeleted, file_exists as fileExists, attachment_size as attachmentSize
FROM attachment
WHERE attachment_idx = #{attachmentIdx}
mapper.update:
UPDATE attachment
SET file_exists = '1'
WHERE attachment_idx in
#{attchmentIndex}

UPDATE attachment
SET file_exists = '0'
WHERE attachment_idx in
#{attchmentIndex}
update attachment set board_idx = #{boardIdx}, board_article_idx = #{boardArticleIdx}, attachment_order = #{attachmentOrder} where attachment_idx = #{attachmentIdx}
mapper.insert: insert into attachment_download_history ( attachment_idx, board_idx, board_article_idx, server_file_name, attachment_name, attachment_ext, attachment_size, date_created, user_ip, user_country, user_subdivision, user_city ) values ( #{attachmentIdx}, #{boardIdx}, #{boardArticleIdx}, #{serverFileName}, #{attachmentName}, #{attachmentExt}, #{attachmentSize}, now(), #{userIp}, #{userCountry}, #{userSubdivision}, #{userCity} )
